name: raitech-portfolio
description: RaiTech - Professional portfolio website for Rai Faisal, IT Professional and founder of RaiTech. Featuring dynamic pages, blog system, project gallery, and SEO optimization.

scripts.build: npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
scripts.minify-css: echo 'CSS minification - implement with cssnano or similar'
scripts.minify-js: echo 'JS minification - implement with terser or similar'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && git add . && git commit -m 'Production build' && git push origin main
